expectations.text: behavioral_check: Routes through `VideoFile` (the per-session mapping) restricted by `nwb_file_name`, NOT through `CameraDevice` alone (which is a global name-keyed lookup with no session attr in its heading)

behavioral_check: Recognizes that `camera_name` on `VideoFile` is a secondary column — NOT a declared `-> CameraDevice` FK — and the link is by name match (validated at ingest in `_prepare_video_entry`)
expectations.evidence: Treats camera_name as the link but does not explicitly note that on VideoFile it is a secondary attribute rather than a declared FK; only generic 'check .heading' caveat.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Restricts `VideoFile` by `nwb_file_name` (a PK field via `-> TaskEpoch`); does NOT attempt `CameraDevice & {nwb_file_name: ...}` (silent no-op, no such attr in CameraDevice's heading)
expectations.evidence: VideoFile and TaskEpoch are restricted by nwb_file_name; CameraDevice is restricted only by `camera_name`, never by nwb_file_name.
